all_facts.fact: Grants NFT holders exclusive control over digital territories or assets in the Block Topia metaverse.
Often tied to staking rewards or events like Hard Fork Games, empowering holders to shape virtual landscapes.
Echoes the street-art act of claiming space, translating physical tagging into blockchain-backed ownership.
Grants NFT holders exclusive control over digital territories or assets in Block Topia, acting as a virtual deed in the metaverse.
Often tied to staking rewards or events like Hard Fork Games, empowering holders to shape virtual landscapes and narratives.
Echoes the street-art act of claiming space, translating physical tagging into blockchain-backed ownership in the Crypto Moonboys universe.
Represents a strategic tool for factions, turning digital ownership into a form of rebellion and territorial dominance.

Seeding rights grant NFT holders unparalleled control over digital territories in Block Topia, acting as virtual deeds that mirror the street-art act of claiming a wall, allowing factions to imprint their will on the metaverse through strategic staking or victories in events like the Hard Fork Games.

In the Crypto Moonboys universe, seeding rights are a catalyst for conflict and creation, empowering holders to transform empty digital spaces into cultural fortresses or war zones, where the act of planting a flag can ignite rivalries or forge new chapters in Block Topia’s ever-evolving lore.

Often tied to the Graffiti Kings’ ethos of territorial rebellion, seeding rights turn the abstract landscape of the metaverse into a canvas of power, where each claimed asset or territory becomes a testament to a faction’s strength, daring rivals like HODL Warriors to challenge their dominion.
